The '''Gopso'o''' were a tribe of [[Drovian]]s from [[Nim Drovis]]. Though virtually identical to their rival tribe, the [[Drovian (tribe)|Drovians]], the two were at [[Nim Drovis Civil War|war]] for longer than either side could remember. If a Drovian that [[Ism Oolos]] interviewed was to be believed, Gopso'o seemed to enjoy killing innocent family members of their Drovian enemies. After the events of the [[Death Seed]] plague, the [[New Jedi Order]] mediated a truce between the Gopso'o and the Drovians.
